title: 10 best herbal creams for dry hair
description: Urtica dioica, also known as stinging nettle, creams helps with dry hair because of its rich moisturizing properties. The cream is infused with the extract of the plant, which is known to lock in moisture and soothe dry scalp irritations. The antioxidants present in Urtica dioica cream also help to repair and protect the hair follicles, promoting healthy hair growth.
